channel.title: CyberTender Radar
channel.description: Daily ranked cyber and IT public-sector opportunities.

item.title: Cyber Security Services 3
item.description: Crown Commercial Service | GBP 800.0m | deadline 2029-02-11. Matches cyber, cyber security, it services; marked SME-suitable; value around GBP 800.0m; deadline in 933 days.

item.title: IT and Cyber Security Services
item.description: Procurement Assist Limited c/o Integrated Facilities Management Bolton Ltd (iFM Bolton) | GBP 75.0m | deadline 2029-05-31. Matches cyber, cyber security, it services; marked SME-suitable; value around GBP 75.0m; deadline in 1042 days.

item.title: BLC0109 - Digital Forensic Services DPS
item.description: BlueLight Commercial | GBP 60.0m | deadline 2027-02-28. Matches digital forensics, digital; marked SME-suitable; value around GBP 60.0m; deadline in 219 days.

item.title: CyberNext: Advance Cybersecurity and AI Readiness
item.description: U.S. Mission to Albania | Grant value varies | deadline 2026-08-20. Matches cyber, cybersecurity; deadline in 27 days.

item.title: Cybersecurity Innovation for Cyberinfrastructure
item.description: U.S. National Science Foundation | Grant value varies | deadline 2027-01-20. Matches cyber, cybersecurity; deadline in 180 days.

item.title: National Agreement for the Provision of Digital Forensics Services - (Procurement led by The Forensic Capability Network (FCN - the Authority) on behalf of Dorset Police & Crime Commissioner)
item.description: South West Police Procurement Department (SWPPD) | GBP 60.0m | deadline 2028-10-16. Matches digital forensics, digital, it services; marked SME-suitable; value around GBP 60.0m; deadline in 815 days.
